untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'previous support/resistance levels' and 'reversal detection within N bars' which require multi-bar state management and custom level detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set. Specifically: (1) dynamic S/R level identification from price history, (2) sustained breakout confirmation over N closes, (3) reversal lookback detection within N bars. These require custom pivot detection or swing high/low tracking beyond the allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses pivot points (pivot, r1, s1) as proxy for support/resistance levels and volume ratio as breakout confirmation, but cannot fully express the sustained confirmation requirement (N closes beyond level), reversal lookback detection, or ATR-based stop loss without custom state tracking. The rule is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT and requires conditional logic to determine direction based on whether breakout is above or below levels.
